updates.title: New Pro Subscription Experience!
updates.description: We've completely redesigned the subscription page with glowing animations and a premium dark theme. Check it out!

updates.title: New Sound & Music Packs!
updates.description: Customize your experience with 7 new music tracks and an updated Dog Sound Pack for your mascot. Visit the shop to check them out!

updates.title: Library Activation
updates.description: You can now manage your purchased sound packs and music directly in your library. Activate and deactivate them whenever you want!

updates.title: Unified Library
updates.description: Your library is now a central hub for everything! View your shop items, saved notes, drawings, and challenges in one place.

updates.title: New Toast Notifications
updates.description: We've replaced browser alerts with smooth, bubbly toast notifications for a much better user experience.

updates.title: Improved Saving
updates.description: Fixed issues with saving challenges and notes. Your progress is now more secure than ever.

updates.title: Haptic Feedback
updates.description: Added subtle vibrations for key actions like deleting items, giving the app a more premium feel.
